[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0110100111 6
1 0111111101 8
2 0000000101 2
3 0110011000 4
4 1011111001 7
5 1011101111 8
6 1100111100 6
7 0010100010 3

23 0111111000 6

45 0100000000 1
56 0000010000 1
67 0011000011 4
70 1100011100 5
